plot_frame_box.description: Inner axis frame, detected as the long dark vertical/horizontal lines bounding the data area.

data_to_pixel_formula.col: col = (x_value - b_x_inv) / m_x_inv  where m_x_inv = 1/m_x, b_x_inv = -b_x/m_x  (i.e. col = (x_value + 1.581784) / 0.017614)

worked_example.scenario: Verify the calibration on the printed tick (x=4, y=6).
worked_example.verification: Detected x-tick centers at col 316 (value 4) and y-tick at row 214 (value 6); both match within <1 px.

detection_internals.frame_detection_rule: vertical/horizontal dark (gray<80) line runs spanning >40% of the orthogonal extent; first and last clusters taken as axis frame edges
detection_internals.x_tick_label_rule: dark text clusters in band rows bot+3..bot+18, columns 0..W; cluster gap=15 px
detection_internals.y_tick_label_rule: dark text clusters in band cols left-22..left-5, rows 0..bot+8; cluster gap=12 px

legend_exclusion_used_for_frame.note: Tight bbox around the legend's swatches + text rows; chosen to not overlap the Series A circle at (533, 134) or (610, 125).
